sections.daemon_scope: May power runtime status after a route is opened.
Owns current-device local facts exposed by riido daemon status, health, ready, metrics, stop, logs, and start.
Owns only runtime execution after an already-authorized runtime binding/model/instruction is assigned.
Consumes only SaaS assignments that already passed target-scope policy, then controls the selected runtime.

direct_host_helper_rule: Direct host-helper actions remain current-device local facts in C11.
assignment_authorization_rule: SaaS assignment and daemon command authorization are upstream agent-access facts.
